integrations.name: Gmail
integrations.description: Send, read, search, and manage emails
setupSteps: Click 'Sign in with Google' below
Choose your Google account and grant Gmail access
That's it — you can now send and read emails

integrations.name: Google Drive
integrations.description: Files, folders, sharing, search in Google Drive
setupSteps: Go to Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service Accounts
Create a service account and grant it Drive access
Click the service account → Keys → Add Key → Create new key → JSON
Copy the entire JSON content and paste it below
Share any Drive folders with the service account email

integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.description: Repos, issues, pull requests, code search
setupSteps: If you have GitHub CLI (gh) installed, your token is detected automatically — just click Connect
Otherwise: go to github.com → Settings → Developer Settings → Personal Access Tokens
Click 'Generate new token', name it 'Delt', select repo access
Copy the token and paste it below

integrations.name: Slack
setupSteps: Go to api.slack.com/apps and sign in
Click 'Create New App' → 'From scratch'
Name it 'Delt' and pick your workspace
Go to 'OAuth & Permissions' in the sidebar, scroll to 'Scopes', and add: channels:read, chat:write, users:read
Scroll up and click 'Install to Workspace', then copy the Bot User OAuth Token

integrations.name: Notion
setupSteps: Go to notion.so/profile/integrations
Click 'New integration' and name it 'Delt'
Select your workspace and click Submit
Copy the Internal Integration Token that appears
Important: Go to the Notion pages you want accessible, click ··· → Connections → Add your Delt integration

integrations.name: Linear
setupSteps: Go to Linear → Settings (gear icon) → Account → API
Click 'Create key' under Personal API Keys
Give it a label like 'Delt' and click Create
Copy the key that appears

integrations.name: Stripe
setupSteps: Go to dashboard.stripe.com and sign in
Click Developers → API Keys in the top nav
Copy your Secret key (starts with sk_test_ or sk_live_)
Tip: use a Test mode key first to try it safely

integrations.name: Shopify
setupSteps: Go to your Shopify Admin (your-store.myshopify.com/admin)
Navigate to Settings → Apps and sales channels → Develop apps
Click 'Create an app', name it 'Delt'
Under 'Configuration', select the API scopes you need
Click 'Install app' and copy the Admin API access token

integrations.name: HubSpot
setupSteps: Go to HubSpot → Settings (gear icon) → Account Setup → Integrations → Private Apps
Click 'Create a private app'
Name it 'Delt' and go to the Scopes tab
Select: CRM → Contacts (Read/Write), Deals (Read/Write), Tickets (Read)
Click 'Create app' and copy the access token that appears

integrations.name: Trello
setupSteps: Go to trello.com/power-ups/admin and sign in
Click 'New' to create a Power-Up (or use an existing one)
Go to the API Key section and click 'Generate a new API Key'
Then click the 'Token' link next to your key to generate a token
Authorize it and copy the token

integrations.name: Figma
setupSteps: Go to figma.com and click your avatar → Settings
Scroll down to 'Personal access tokens'
Click 'Create a new personal access token'
Name it 'Delt', choose an expiration, and click 'Create token'
Copy the token immediately

integrations.name: Airtable
setupSteps: Go to airtable.com/create/tokens
Click 'Create new token'
Name it 'Delt', add scopes: data.records:read, data.records:write
Select which bases to grant access to
Click 'Create token' and copy it

integrations.name: Custom API
integrations.description: Connect any service that has an API key
setupSteps: Find the API docs for the service you want to connect
Look for 'API Keys', 'Developer Settings', or 'Integrations' in their settings
Create a new API key and copy it
Paste it below
